args:
Use Codex internal Image Gen only for exactly one Seolleyeon AI profile asset.
Do not use OpenAI Image API. Do not use Batch API. Do not require OPENAI_API_KEY.
Do not modify CLIP/SVD/KNN/RRF recommender files or any recommender pipeline code.
Generate exactly one image, then stop. Do not continue to the next asset. Do not run QA.
Do not recover, copy, move, rename, or import generated files; the parent bounded executor owns recovery and file QA after this call.

Single asset to generate:
assetId: female_997__vibe_card__v001
profileId: female_997
gender: female
numericId: 997
shotType: vibe_card
targetFaceType: deer_like
targetLooksLevelBand: 2.5-3.2
attempt: 1
promptHash: a00805b20c965e2db2ab7dd4
expectedRawPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/raw/female_997__vibe_card__v001__attempt01.png
expectedFinalPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/997/vibe_card.png

Reference requirement:
- referenceAssetId: female_997__face_card__v001
- referenceImagePath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/997/face_card.png
- Use this face_card as the same-person identity anchor.
- If this Codex/Image Gen surface cannot use that reference image, stop and report reference_image_input_unavailable; do not generate an independent dependent shot.

Generation prompt:
Using the attached face_card image as the same person reference, generate exactly one vibe_card image.

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_997__vibe_card__v001
profileId: female_997
shotType: vibe_card

Goal:
Same person as the reference face_card.
Generate a realistic campus/cafe/library/exhibition lifestyle profile photo.
The mood should be calm, sincere, and trustworthy.
Not nightlife.
Not influencer content.
No readable logo, school name, text, or watermark.

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Identity consistency:
same person as the canonical portrait, same general facial structure, a soft oval face, medium-large calm eyes, a delicate jawline, a gentle quiet expression, same long, natural dark brown, soft wavy hair with light natural bangs, same natural grooming.

Mood and lifestyle:
standing near a campus garden with a relaxed sincere expression, soft mature romantic everyday fashion, calm, sincere, campus-based relationship platform mood, not flashy, not nightlife-oriented.

Composition:
half-body or environmental portrait, the person is naturally engaged in a quiet everyday activity, face still recognizable but not overly posed, relaxed shoulders, gentle expression.

Location:
quiet campus cafe or study lounge, warm neutral interior, no brand logos, no readable text.

Lighting and camera:
soft ambient daylight, realistic smartphone photo, warm but clean color tone, authentic profile image.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.
